technology_stack.tech_summary: Swift 6 / SwiftUI+AppKit / AVAudioEngine+TimePitch / Sparkle 2 / KeyboardShortcuts / XcodeGen / OSLog; macOS 13+; strict concurrency complete; hardened runtime ON; ~91 XCTest
Python 3.10+ (3.13 prod) / FastAPI / uvicorn[standard] / httpx / trafilatura / Pydantic v2; 94 pytest; binds 127.0.0.1:8766
Next.js 16 App Router / React 19 / TypeScript 5.7 / Tailwind 3.4; single-page; 16 hand-rolled SVG/CSS components; deployed on Vercel; no tests (gap)
Bash 3.2 portable; 27 LOC wrapper around POST /speak (v1); symlinked to ~/.local/bin/myna by install.sh

GitHub Actions (release.yml 9 jobs + ci.yml + appcast.yml); bash 3.2 portable shell scripts (build/sign/notarize/dmg/appcast/_lib); Apple Developer ID + xcrun notarytool; Sparkle 2 EdDSA sign_update; Homebrew DSL (cask + formula with 40 PyPI resource blocks + rust dep); launchd plist templates; Hammerspoon Lua legacy; Claude Code Stop hook; idempotent install.sh; 16/16 dist smoke tests
